source: GA4 property 250338585 (last 7d, utm_content split) + Shopify orders (by country)
note: A/B landing-page experiments. Refreshed weekly by Polly. UI reads top-level `experiments`; extra fields (aggregate_7d, real_sales_90d, built_not_yet_live) preserved for future UI surfaces.

experiments.name: Big Box LP — Headline & Hero (EN)
experiments.hypothesis: Variant B (price-anchored CTA 'Get Your Box · From €39.95', single Big Box hero, prominent stats, scrolling reviews, FAQ) converts better than Variant A (carousel of 3 products, 'Choose Your Adventure' CTA).
experiments.polly_note: B wins clearly again this week — EN page 1.34% vs 0.43% (22 vs 7 txn); aggregate 1.03% vs 0.54% (27 vs 14). B has now led 3 weeks running and the gap is widening, not noise. Cumulative is approaching ~65 conv (B) vs ~36 (A) — still under the ~100/variant bar for a formal call, but the direction is consistent and strong. RECOMMENDATION: run 1-2 more weeks to clear the threshold, then promote B to the new control and start the next test (V3 bundle/UGC concept vs B). No change yet. (GA4 conv% still understates absolute conversion due to lossy LP->checkout attribution — read A/B relative, not absolute.)

experiments.name: Localized LP variants (IT / FR / DE)
experiments.hypothesis: Translated A/B variants would convert non-EN paid traffic at rates comparable to EN.

real_sales_90d.note: These markets DO convert and sell. The near-0% on the LP rows is a MEASUREMENT artifact (lossy LP->checkout attribution), not a funnel failure. Numbers last refreshed 2026-06-22 — Polly to wire Shopify auto-pull into weekly signal.

experiments.polly_note: Hold. Still a tracking artifact, not a funnel problem — localized LP conv reads ~0.2-0.5% but Shopify shows IT/DE/FR converting at 1.7-2.9% with real revenue (IT is our 3rd-largest market). DO NOT PAUSE. Action remains: fix GA4 purchase-currency + ensure the same GA4 property fires through checkout so LP-level conv becomes true. Until then judge localized LPs by engagement (bounce 10-18%, healthy) + market-level Shopify orders, not LP conv%.

built_not_yet_live.name: V3 (bundle widget + UGC reel + FB comment proof)
built_not_yet_live.note: Next test: promote to live A/B vs B once EN test clears significance (~1-2 weeks).

built_not_yet_live.name: Try the Game (interactive 3-phase playable demo)
built_not_yet_live.note: Play-before-you-pay hook. Candidate for its own dedicated LP + Meta test.
